title: "Save as Template" grayed out in Enterprise plan
excerpt: We just got move to the Enterprise plan, but my “Save as Template” is grayed out. Why?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: We just got move to the Enterprise plan, but my “Save as Template” is grayed out. Why?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: what does it show when you hover over it? Something like “templates are only available on main boards”?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yep, I see that now. I wasn’t hovering.
So…it is a private board . . . . I will have to convert to a “Main” board, save as template, then convert back to a “Private” board?
